# User Story

**Story ID**: [US-001]
**Feature**: [Feature name or epic]
**Author**: [Product Manager name]
**Sprint**: [Sprint number]
**Status**: Draft | Ready | In Progress | Done

---

## User Story

```
As a [type of user],
I want to [perform some action],
So that [I can achieve some goal/benefit].
```

## Context & Background

[1-2 sentences explaining why this story exists and the user context]

## Acceptance Criteria

Given/When/Then format:

```gherkin
Given [precondition]
When [action]
Then [expected outcome]

Given [another precondition]
When [action]
Then [expected outcome]
```

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Feature implemented and code reviewed
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] QA tested against acceptance criteria
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Deployed to staging

[Link to wireframes, Figma file, or embed screenshot]
